title: Meet our Team
summary: At TechLekh, we are proud to have a dedicated team of professionals who are passionate about technology and committed to providing our readers with high-quality news and analysis. content:
At TechLekh, we are proud to have a dedicated team of professionals who are passionate about technology and committed to providing our readers with high-quality news and analysis. Get to know our team members below.

Our leadership team is responsible for overseeing the day-to-day operations of TechLekh. They work together to ensure that TechLekh is always operating efficiently and effectively.

Abhishek Gupta CEO / Cofounder / Editor-in-Chief

Anmol Shrestha COO / Partner

Our editorial team is responsible for researching, reporting, and creating the content that appears on TechLekh. They are experienced writers and editors who are passionate about technology and dedicated to delivering accurate, insightful news and analysis.

Raizel Tandukar Writer – Gadgets and Tech

Deep Shrestha Writer – Gadgets and Tech

Our video team is responsible for creating engaging and informative video content that showcases the latest technology news and trends in Nepal. They are a group of talented videographers and video editors who are passionate about visual storytelling and dedicated to delivering high-quality video content to our readers.

Rupesh Shah Video Editor / Videographer

Yuvraj Thapa Video Editor / Videographer

Saurav Subedi Jr. Video Editor / Videographer

Ayush Ghimire Intern. Video Editor / Videographer

Apart from our in-house team, we have some members who are not actively working but are indirectly supporting the team with their expertise and experience. They are an integral part of the TechLekh family, and we are grateful for their contribution to our success.

Subigya Nepal Cofounder / Partner

Jubindra KC Partner

Bidur Bastola Partner

meta.og:title: Meet our Team
meta.og:description: Meet the team behind TechLekh - passionate writers, editors, and tech enthusiasts bringing you quality content.
